task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the Camp Nou stadium location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Satellite imagery showing the Camp Nou stadium (distinct large oval stadium) centered in the map view.

task_completion.description: Agent creates the specified folder in the application sidebar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A folder named 'Camp Nou Field Survey' is visible in the 'Places' or 'My Places' sidebar panel.

task_completion.description: Agent places placemarks at the four corners of the pitch.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Four placemarks/pins are visible on the corners of the green pitch area. Labels 'NW Corner', 'NE Corner', 'SW Corner', 'SE Corner' appear on the map or in the sidebar.

task_completion.description: Agent uses the measurement tool to determine field dimensions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Ruler or Measurement tool dialog is open, showing a line drawn along the length (~105m) or width (~68m) of the pitch.

task_completion.description: Agent exports the placemarks to a KML file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save File' dialog or file manager window shows 'camp_nou_survey.kml' being saved to '/home/ga/Documents/'.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the text report with dimensions and compliance check.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor is visible with 'field_measurements.txt' open, containing dimensions close to 105m/68m and a statement confirming FIFA compliance.

integrity.description: Agent used a GUI map application (e.g., Google Earth Pro) rather than scripting.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the interface of a mapping application with toolbars and a 3D/2D map view, not just a terminal or code editor.

integrity.description: Placemarks were positioned visually on the map.
integrity.visual_evidence: Agent is seen clicking on the map corners to place pins or using the 'Add Placemark' dialog, rather than writing raw KML XML code.

integrity.description: Reported dimensions match the tool's output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values written in the text file correspond to the values displayed by the measurement tool in the screenshots (e.g., if tool says 105.2m, text file shouldn't just say generic '105').

privileged_info_for_vlm: Camp Nou is located at 41.3809° N, 2.1228° E. The pitch is 105m long and 68m wide. FIFA requirements are min 100m length, 64m width. The agent should measure values close to 105m and 68m and conclude the field is compliant.
